dmr_annotation

Source: R/util_data.R
dmr_annotation.Rd

Differentially methylated region (DMR) annotations for CpG probes on Illumina methylation arrays. Contains only probes that overlap at least one known imprinted or disease-associated DMR. This lightweight table (~1,600 rows) supplements the Bioconductor array annotation packages used by anno_probe_annotation_build, which do not carry DMR-level annotations.

Usage

dmr_annotation

Format

A data frame with three columns:

PROBE

Illumina probe identifier (e.g. "cg00000924").

DMR_WHOLE

Genomic region label of the enclosing DMR (e.g. "KCNQ1OT1:TSS-DMR").

DMR_DMR

Fine-grained DMR label, identical to DMR_WHOLE for most probes.

On this page
